title: ExtremeClient
description: ExtremeClient is designed for PvP, and everything in this pack helps you to win
body:
ExtremeClient was made for improving official vanilla PvP experience, by:
- Making Minecraft faster on all devices
- Optimizing gameplay for large servers
- Features to help PvP

I added some features like:
- Making the totem small when the player dies
- Small fire when burning
- No pumpkin blur
- Glowing ores (because why not)
- Bigger resolution of blocks
- Icons for enchants

To fix bugs, I added:
- AntiGhost for ghost blocks
- Model Gap Fix to prevent the item models (in hand) from having white lines, gaps in it

Support features:
- JourneyMap for mapping the world (and to find players :)
- More Chat History to see more of the past chat (or while you were AFK)
- No Fog to prevent the annoying fog from appearing

Some resourcepacks may not work properly (on specific devices) so please check out before applying them


**_I made this modpack for the 100th download on my profile. If you want to support me, download my projects or consider a donation on paypal_**
